title: Kai's Crafting Tweaks
description: A small QoL datapack that adds or changes some crafting recipes to make your life easier
body:
# Features
This datapack contains some small crafting recipe changes and additions and other small tweaks.
## Functions
Totem Message: a message appears in chat when a player uses a totem of undying

## Uncrafting
- Block of amethyst uncrafting to 4 shards
- Honeycomb block uncrafting to 4 honey comb
- Quartz block uncrafting to 4 quartz
- Glowstone uncrafting to 4 glowstone dust

## Crafting
### Shaped
- Calcite
> from 2 quartz and 2 diorite blocks, shaped like crafting andesite
- Light blocks 
> 1 glowstone block + 4 glow ink sacks, shaped like crafting a redstone lamp
- Soul soil
> 2x2 soul sand => 4 soul soil
- Soul lantern and torches
> placing a soul soil block under a torch or a lantern "converts" that item into the soul variant
- Polished Deepslate
> now possible with regular and cobbled deepslate in a 2x2 shape in a crafting grid
- Hanging Sign
> all variants now possible with stripped wood and logs
- Quartz
   - Chiseled quartz blocks from smooth quartz slabs
   - Quartz bricks are craftable from all other quartz blocks
   - Quartz pillars are craftable from all other quartz blocks

### Shapeless
- Rooted dirt
> from dirt and hanging roots
- Small Dripleaf (duplication)
> from small dripleaf and bonemeal

## Stonecutter
These are Vanilla Features since Minecraft 26.1
- Cobblestone crafting in a Stonecutter
> from regular stone for all of those who mine with silk touch pickaxes only
- Cobbled Deepslate
> in a stonecutter, like the cobblestone recipe from above

## Special
- Coarse Dirt slabs from 3 Coarse Dirt
> requires [my resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kais-minecraft-tweaks) for it to work
